# Postiz Dry-Run Readiness

Generated: 2026-06-12T06:36:31.481Z
Campaign: cc-rubber-base-demo-2026-06-10
Status: blocked_by_human_review

## Safety

- Dry-run only: yes
- Network calls allowed: no
- Nothing has been posted live: yes

## Checklist

- Human approval recorded: blocked - Complete review and record approve, needs_revision, or reject first.
- Manual Postiz package: ready - Manual upload package is available for review.
- Local Postiz input safety: ready - Local Postiz input files contain IDs/media references only, not API keys or tokens.
- Uploaded Postiz media: blocked - Real uploaded media id/path values are required for every approved asset (0/3 ready).
- Postiz integration IDs: blocked - Real Postiz integration IDs are required.
- Postiz dry-run package: blocked - Dry-run package has not been created.

## Next Action

- Complete human review before building any Postiz draft payload.
